(Pg 235, M)
i) ~~ Glucose 6 — phosphate
ii) Pyruvic acid
iii) Carbohydrate
iv) Fructose-1, 6-bisphosphate
v) Glucose
vi) Dihydroxy Acetone Phosphate 2
Glyceraldehyde 3 —- phosphate
A), iil, iv, v, vi, ii B)iii, iv, v, ii, i, vi
C)iii, v, i, ii,iv, vi D)iii, v, i, iv, vi, ii
14.7 Respiratory Quotient
99. Which statement is true about RQ?
(Pg 236, M)
i) It is also called respiratory ratio.
ii) It is the volume of O2 released over
the volume of CO2 evolved during
respiration.
iii) RQ of diff. substrate is different.
A) Only i B) Only iii
C) Both i and iii D) All of the above
100. Choose the correct. (Pg 236, M)
A) RQ = volume of CO; evolved /volume of
O02 consumed
B) RQ = volume of Oz consumed /volume of
CO evolved
C) RQ = volume of O» evolved/volume of
CO3 consumed
D) None of the above
101. What will be the RQ for the following
equation (Pg 236, M)
2(C31H2s806) + 145 O2 — 102 CO2 + 98 H.0
+ Energy
